suggestions.topic: Repricing numbers (EIP-8038, EIP-2780) final confirmation for devnet-7
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #240 deferred final repricing confirmation until benchmark suite results available. Devnet-7 launch targeting week of July 7—this is a blocking decision for spec stability.
Target launch was week of July 7 (Wednesday July 9). This call (July 13) needs confirmation of launch status, client participation, and any blocking issues discovered post-launch.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7928 BAL state access behavioral spec change resolution
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #240 identified EIP-8038 requires additional pre-access check before slot DB read; behavioral spec change needed in EIP-7928 or EIP-8038. PR #11854 opened but no resolution confirmed. Blocks devnet-7 stability.
Deferred from ACDE #239 due to presenter absence. Expected revisit at next call (ACDE #241). Proposed for Hegota; needs team feedback before August 6 proposal deadline.

suggestions.topic: Hegota headliner decision and CFI discussion
suggestions.rationale: August 6 proposal deadline approaching (3.5 weeks out). 15+ EIPs proposed for Hegota across ACDE #237-240. Need to surface which proposals are serious CFI candidates vs. informational/exploratory.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7610 status and Glamsterdam inclusion decision
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from glamsterdam-devnet-6 (ACDE #238), no later revisit confirmed. Needs explicit decision whether it targets devnet-8+ or is DFI'd from Glamsterdam entirely.
Deferred from devnet-4 (ACDE #237) pending BAL Discord decision. No updates in subsequent calls. If Discord thread resolved async, should be confirmed; if not, needs escalation.
ACDE #239 noted Geth, Besu, ethrex progressing; proposed for Glamsterdam or Hegota. No follow-up in ACDE #240. Should clarify target fork to inform implementation priority.
